headline: Donald Trump Is Against TikTok Ban Because It Would Help 'Facebook And Zuckerschmuck' Double Their Business
summary: Former President Donald Trump opposes a potential TikTok ban in the U.S., suggesting it would benefit Meta Platforms Inc.'s Facebook and CEO Mark Zuckerberg, amid legislative efforts to require ByteDance to divest from the app.
